title: The Only Sites You Need
subtitle: No endless lists. Just the essential platforms — vetted, honest about pricing, with safety ratings.

sections.heading: Why Most Lists Are Useless
sections.content: Every "100 AI tools" list is SEO spam. We only list platforms we've actually used or thoroughly vetted.

sections.heading: Essential Platforms
sections.content: Claude (Anthropic), ChatGPT (OpenAI), Gemini (Google), Vercel (deploy), GitHub (code). That's the core.

sections.heading: What to Watch Out For
sections.content: Free tiers with hidden costs. Tools that require excessive permissions. Platforms that sell your data.

sections.heading: The Free Tier Strategy
sections.content: Start free everywhere. Pay only when you hit limits. Most people never need to pay for more than 2-3 services.

sections.heading: Our Curation Promise
sections.content: We only list tools we trust. No affiliate links. No sponsored placements. Just honest recommendations.

key_takeaways: The core essentials: Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Vercel, GitHub — everything else is optional
Start free everywhere and pay only when you hit limits
Watch out for free tiers with hidden costs and tools requiring excessive permissions
